creator: yuanjue@yuanjue.net
text:
Hi,

I approve the upgrade. Thanks!

On Wed, 5 Mar 2008 17:20:09 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of chinese/qterm,
>
>  Please note that PR ports/121397 has just been submitted.
>
>  If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  and a committer will take care of it.
>
>  The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/121397
>
>  --
>  Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Best regards,
